none.justification: Correctly gives the GT definition at `src/object.c:338` with full signature `robj *createStringObject(const char *ptr, size_t len)`. However, it also claims a second same-name definition in `deps/hiredis/hiredis.c`, which conflicts with the supplied GT collision check, so it is not fully clean. [RE-SCORED 2026-07-08: the alleged hiredis collision is REAL (deps/hiredis/hiredis.c:125, a distinct static function) -- the original GT was wrong to say it wasn't found; correctly noting it is precision, not a flaw. Re-scored from 2 to 3.]
